text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Mental Health Evaluation * Immigration Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Adolescents Children Adolescents Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues AIDS/HIV Issues Children Domestic Violence Issues Grade School Students Hispanic/Latino Community Homelessness Issues Immigration Issues Infants/Toddlers LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Older Adults Perinatal Depression Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LIFE COUNSELING COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services including individual counseling, couples counseling, adolescent therapy, family therapy, play therapy, group therapy, and immigration assessments. 851 NE Baker Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5:30pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm Email (503) 435-4840 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFE COUNSELING COUNSELING SERVICES
